name: vs-tipi
description: Tipi enclosures — at-the-computer agentic fleet coordination. Currently ships one plugin: tipi, the VS Code Agents enclosure.

plugins.name: tipi
plugins.description: Minimal enclosure for gathering and sharing with the fleet — 5 agents, 6 slash commands, Today chat mode, 7 MCP servers wired to the portable tipi core (github.com/JackReis/tipi).
